summaryForNext: 4 goals: G1 admin-authn NOT MET (CRITICAL, build first — admin router has zero authn middleware, loopback-only), G2 RFC 8693 token-exchange NOT MET (CRITICAL — reuse JwtMinter.mint + jwt_verify), G3 client-credentials/RFC 7662 introspection NOT MET (HIGH — reuse mint/verify + client store), G4 NHI-as-Cedar-principal PARTIAL (make_uid already generic over entity type; needs principal-TYPE thread-through + lifecycle store). Open questions for analyze: admin-authn mechanism (reuse JWT/Kratos vs dedicated cred); adopt-vs-hand-roll RFC 8693/7662 under jsonwebtoken@9 pin; opaque-token store for introspection.
